description_long: This hoverboard features a striking red and black flame-patterned exterior, giving it a bold and dynamic appearance. It has two large, rugged wheels with deep treads, suitable for urban and possibly off-road surfaces. The footpads are wide, black, and textured for grip, positioned on either side of a central hinge that allows for independent tilting. The body is streamlined and slightly curved, with raised wheel arches and a low ground clearance. The construction appears to be primarily hard plastic with metal reinforcements, and the wheels are likely rubber with visible tread patterns. No visible lights, logos, or control interfaces are present on the exterior.
description: A red and black flame-patterned hoverboard with large, rugged wheels and textured black footpads. Its design is bold, streamlined, and built for urban mobility.
description_view_0: Side view showing both large, treaded wheels and the full length of the flame-patterned body with black footpads.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width of the wheel, the raised wheel arch, and the central hinge area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the other side of the hoverboard and both wheels.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the wheel's width and the flame pattern on the body.
attribute_wheel_configuration: Two large, parallel wheels located at each end of the board, with deep treads and a rugged design for stability and traction.
attribute_footpad_design: Two wide, rectangular black footpads with a textured, grippy surface for traction, positioned on either side of the central hinge. The pads are slightly raised and contoured for foot placement.
